ModMetaData.name: PawnDiary: RimTalk bridge
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description: Minimal developer bridge between Pawn Diary and RimTalk. When enabled, it logs displayed RimTalk chat facts and recent Pawn Diary context summaries for the speaking pawn and target pawn. This adapter is deployed as a separate RimWorld mod through scripts/deploy-integrations.ps1.
